package.name: explorer_r2_sim
package.description: CMU Team Explorer's R2 (SubT challenge) rover in a Gazebo cave world. Ships the SDF world + vehicle, a ros_gz_bridge YAML config, an RViz layout, and a launch file that brings the whole stack up. Sensors: Ouster OS0-32 lidar, RGB camera, IMU, magnetometer, NavSat (GPS). Intended as a sandbox for teleoperation, sensor inspection, and downstream sensor fusion.
